title: Auto Stirring Magic Mug - 12oz, Magnetic, Built-in Stiri Bar, Self Mixing, Electric Travel Spinner
description:
About this item
Automatic Mixing Technology: With a simple press of a button, this self stirring cup automatically mixes your favorite hot or cold drinks, from coffee powder to protein shakes, ensuring an even blend every time
Portable and Spill-Proof Design: Equipped with a secure lid, this mixing cup is perfect for taking your beverages anywhere—whether you're in the kitchen, living room, office, car, gym, or school
Versatile for Various Drinks: Ideal for mixing a variety of beverages such as coffee, tea, milk, lemonade, chocolate powder, protein shakes, and even broth. Suitable for any lightly mixed drink
Easy to Clean: If the stirring function isn’t needed, use it as a regular stainless steel water cup. Cleaning is simple—just rinse with tap water for hassle-free maintenance
One-Button Operation: Designed for convenience, simply press the button to activate or stop the stirring function, making it easy to use in any situation
reviews_5s: Bone broth, miralax in orange juice, tea, etc…
reviews_1s: I purchased this cup ,did not have it a week and it quit working,I contacted Amazon about it they said a new one will be sent out,it’s been three weeks now and still no cup,and now can’t get any answers,got to go through this stupid automated robotic thing,it tells me my order was complete but still have no cup
